# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      location: eastus
      properties:
        subnet:
          - name: azureServices
            properties:
              addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24
              serviceEndpoints:
                - AzureFirewall
                - AzureExpressRoute
                - Classic
                - Storage
                - Sql

          - name: onPremises
            properties:
              addressPrefix: 192.168.0.0/16
              serviceEndpoints: []

    - name: storageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      apiVersion: 2019-04-01
      location: eastus
      properties:
        sku: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2
        networkAcls:
          bypass: VirtualNetworkRules
        createMode: Supplemental
        accessTier: Cool
        encryption:
          services:
            blob: AES256
            file: AES256
            queue: AES256
            table: AES256
        allowPublicAccess: true

    - name: sqlServer
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      apiVersion: 2019-03-01-preview
      location: eastus
      properties:
        administratorLogin: adminUser
        administratorLoginPassword: (YourStrongPasswordHere)
        version: 12.0
        createMode: Default
        properties:
          databaseCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
        maximumPoolSize: 34
        minimumPoolSize: 2
        requestMetrics:
          backupRetentionDays: 7
          geoRedundantBackup: Off
        resourceGroupName: (ResourceGroupHere)
        subnetId: /subscriptions/(SubscriptionID)/resourceGroups/(ResourceGroupHere)/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/(VNetName)/subnets/(SubnetName)
